summary: Completed testing of new features: Image uploads, Email notifications, Location-based chat rooms, Region selection, Email preferences. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working.

minor.issue: Old global chat rooms created before feature don't have room_type field - this is expected behavior for legacy data

passed_tests: Backend - Seed Data creates local chat rooms
Backend - Update profile with region field
Backend - Update profile with email_preferences
Backend - Get user profile returns region and email_preferences
Backend - Chat rooms returns local_rooms and global_rooms structure
Backend - Chat rooms with region filter (UK)
Backend - Chat rooms with region filter (US)
Backend - Global rooms available
Backend - Local rooms have room_type field
Backend - Image upload endpoint works
Backend - Image upload rejects invalid file types
Backend - Create post with image
Backend - Update profile picture
Backend - GET /api/notifications
Backend - GET /api/notifications/unread-count
Backend - POST /api/notifications/mark-read
Backend - Join chat room
Backend - Leave chat room
Frontend - Profile page shows region selector when editing
Frontend - Profile page shows email notification preferences (4 toggles)
Frontend - Profile picture upload camera icon appears when editing
Frontend - Chat rooms page shows Local/Global tabs
Frontend - Region selector on chat rooms page
Frontend - Local rooms appear when region is selected (UK shows 2 rooms)
Frontend - Global rooms tab shows all global chat rooms (12 rooms)
Frontend - Create post page has image upload option
Frontend - Image upload area with drag/drop and file type info
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed creates local chat rooms for UK, US, Australia, Europe, Asia regions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Image uploads for posts (base64 storage) and profile pictures 2) Email notification preferences in profile (4 toggles: replies, DMs, friend requests, weekly digest) 3) Location-based chat rooms with Local/Global tabs 4) Region selection in profile and chat rooms page 5) Email notifications endpoints (GET /api/notifications, POST /api/notifications/mark-read). Email sending is CONDITIONAL - only works if RESEND_API_KEY is set in backend/.env.

features_verified.image_uploads: POST /api/upload/image returns base64 data URL, used in posts and profile pictures
features_verified.email_preferences: Profile has email_preferences object with notify_replies, notify_dms, notify_friend_requests, weekly_digest
features_verified.location_chat_rooms: Chat rooms API returns {local_rooms, global_rooms, user_region, available_regions}
features_verified.region_selection: Profile has region field (UK, US, Australia, Europe, Asia, Other)

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending via Resend is CONDITIONAL - only sends if RESEND_API_KEY is set in backend/.env. Without the key, emails are logged but not sent.
